name: Chicken in Avocado and Bacon Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 ounces Bacon, grilled until crispy and finely chopped
Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
Preheat the oven to 400°F. In a blender, purée the avocadoes, chicken stock, and cream until smooth. Add the finely chopped onions and ginger, blending again until well combined.
Place the chicken in an ovenproof dish and pour the avocado mixture over it. Sprinkle the crumbled bacon evenly over the top.
Heat through for 20 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through. Serve immediately and enjoy!
